text: FDA Drug Recall: Recalling firm Kalman Health & Wellness, Inc. dba Essential Wellness Pharma. Reason: Lack of Assurance of Sterility:  A recall of all compounded sterile preparations within expiry is being initiated due to observations associated with poor sterile production practices resulting in a lack of sterility assurance for their finished drugs.

FDA Drug Recall: Recalling firm Albek De Mexico S.A. De C.V.. Reason: CGMP Deviations: Next Advanced Antibacterial Hand Sanitizer was found to be below the label claim for ethanol content and contained methanol. Other products were recalled because they were manufactured in the same facility as the product found to contain methanol.
FDA Drug Recall: Recalling firm ProRx LLC. Reason: Lack of Assurance of Sterility
FDA Drug Recall: Recalling firm Teva Pharmaceuticals USA. Reason: Some bottles may contain mixed strengths of the product.
FDA Drug Recall: Recalling firm Perrigo Company PLC. Reason: CGMP Deviations: Products were manufactured with contaminated excipient that was recalled from the excipient supplier.
FDA Drug Recall: Recalling firm Pharmedium Services, LLC. Reason: Presence of Particulate Matter: API contaminated with glass particulate was used to produce sterile injectable drugs.

FDA Drug Recall: Recalling firm Pfizer Inc.. Reason: Labeling: Incorrect or missing lot and or Exp Date: The bottles were labeled with an incorrect expiry date 11/2016.  The correct expiry date is 09/2016.
FDA Drug Recall: Recalling firm Little Moon Essentials LLC. Reason: CGMP deviations
FDA Drug Recall: Recalling firm Pharm D Solutions, LLC. Reason: Lack of Assurance of Sterility

FDA Drug Recall: Recalling firm AmeriSource Bergen. Reason: Temperature abuse: Certain vials of Ifosfamide IV products were not refrigerated at certain Amerisource Bergen Drug Corp distribution centers.
